title: Defining Keyboard Help Text
text: Defining Keyboard Help Text The keyboard help function (^KEY_HELP) looks for its text in a global message which has the same name as the current value of $KEYBOARD in the current library and language. For example, if you have defined a keyboard translation table JIMC, you can define the keyboard help for this as a global message JIMC in the same library and language you will use with this keyboard. When the user activates ^KEY_HELP, the text you entered for the global message JIMC is displayed. When you create your keyboard help message, remember that the definitions in the keyboard translation table can be overridden by accelerator key definitions in the initialization file for the GUI or access keys defined in a form or menu. Related Links $KEYBOARD Specify a translation table for input characters. $keyboard Return or set the current keyboard translation table. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
